narrative:
Pico is a key defender for Cape Verde, establishing himself as a top performer in his position. His overall rating of 7.35/10 places him in the top 1% of defenders at this tournament. This high rating reflects a strong blend of his club form over the last two seasons and his contributions in this World Cup.

His defensive strengths are highlighted by his impressive 6.923 clearances per 90 minutes at this World Cup. Pico also contributes significantly with 1.615 tackles and 1.615 interceptions per 90 minutes, showcasing his ability to break up play. His attacking metrics are lower, with expected goals at 0.057 and expected assists at 0.004 per 90 minutes, indicating a purely defensive role.

Pico serves as a reliable defensive cornerstone for Cape Verde, having played 390 minutes across their matches. Scouts and fans should continue to focus on his consistent ability to nullify threats and his high volume of clearances in the remaining fixtures. His impact is undeniably in solidifying the backline and preventing opposition chances.
